name: python3-qasync
title: python3-qasync
summary: Implementation of the PEP 3156 Event-Loop with Qt
description:
Implementation of the PEP 3156 Event-Loop with Qt
qasync allows coroutines to be used in PyQt/PySide applications by
providing an implementation of the `PEP 3156` event-loop.
.
qasync is a fork of asyncqt, which is a fork of quamash. May it live
longer than its predecessors.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-qasync because Implementation of the PEP 3156 Event-Loop with Qt.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-qasync as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-qasync with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-qasync --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
